Oh, hello.

👋I’m Kelly Tomlinson.

A design & product leader who is unapologetically curious about people, problems, and the spaces in between.

I lead with heart.

I design with taste. And intent.

I make sense of the chaos.

currently...

I lead design at me&u, helping build the world’s most personalized hospitality experience. Some of the things I’m thinking about as I shape design:

  • How the definition of ‘craft’ is evolving.
  • How AI becomes a part of a design team.
  • How roles across the triad blend, blur, and achieve.

previously...

From reimagining property management to helping people with disability find support, redesigning network security, and embedding AI where it actually belongs —
I’ve spent 15+ years across problems worth solving.

some kind words...

beyond the work...

I’m a mom to a little boy who is everything everywhere all at once, and a fur boy who can’t decide between everywhere and nowhere. I drink a lot of water and wine, I believe the best way to connect is over food, I subscribe to escapism via books and shows, & sometimes I draw. You can find me overusing exclamation points, stretching on a reformer, on linked in, & always lost in thought.

& ofc, you can always say hello.

© 2026 Kelly Tomlinson. Built in collaboration with Claude, imperfections & all.
